response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates exceptional depth and breadth in full-stack development, with over 10 years of progressive experience across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Kotlin/Java, Dlang) and industries. Her recent roles show direct relevance to the role's requirements, including AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq), high-throughput systems (Optilyz, Dunnhumby), and full-stack ownership (GISCollective). Her contributions to architecture, scalability, and cross-functional collaboration align closely with the job description. While her primary stack matches well, her exposure to secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java) and AI agent development adds significant value.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with direct relevance to primary and secondary stack requirements
Proven track record of building scalable, high-performance systems and contributing to architecture decisions
Strong problem-solving, collaboration, and leadership in open-source and commercial projects
concerns: Limited evidence of Vitest usage (primary stack requirement) in her recent roles
Minimal mention of PostgreSQL (primary stack requirement) in her experience
Some roles emphasize backend systems with frontend as secondary, though her experience is still substantial

key_factors.factor: Relevant full-stack experience and architecture skills
